name: ACOG — Menstrual Disorders
short_description: Patient FAQs on abnormal uterine bleeding, painful periods, and cycle irregularities from the American College of OB/GYNs.

name: ACOG — Endometriosis
short_description: Plain-language patient guide to endometriosis diagnosis and treatment from the American College of OB/GYNs.

name: ACOG — PCOS
short_description: Patient FAQ on polycystic ovary syndrome — symptoms, diagnosis, and management.

name: IAPMD — Premenstrual Disorders
short_description: The primary resource for PMDD and PME information, peer support, and provider directory.

name: IAPMD — Crisis Support
short_description: IAPMD crisis support resources for people experiencing severe PMDD symptoms.

name: Endometriosis Foundation of America
short_description: Patient resources, symptom diary tools, and information on finding a specialist for endometriosis.

name: Endometriosis UK
short_description: UK patient charity for endometriosis — helpline, local support groups, and information on specialist centre networks.

name: Verity — PCOS UK
short_description: UK charity for people with PCOS — information, peer support, and guidance on getting a diagnosis.

name: PCOS Awareness Association
short_description: US non-profit providing information and community for people with PCOS.

name: NHS — Period Problems
short_description: NHS guidance on heavy periods, painful periods, irregular periods, and when to see a GP.

name: NHS — Endometriosis
short_description: NHS patient information on endometriosis symptoms, diagnosis, and treatment pathways.

name: NHS — PCOS
short_description: NHS patient information on polycystic ovary syndrome.

name: MedlinePlus — Menstruation
short_description: NIH plain-language health information on menstrual cycles and disorders. Public domain.

name: MedlinePlus — Endometriosis
short_description: NIH plain-language information on endometriosis.

name: MedlinePlus — PMDD
short_description: NIH plain-language information on premenstrual dysphoric disorder.

name: RAINN — Sexual Assault Hotline
short_description: National Sexual Assault Hotline — confidential support 24/7.

name: National Domestic Violence Hotline
short_description: 24/7 confidential support for people experiencing domestic violence.

name: Refuge — Domestic Abuse
short_description: UK national charity providing support for women and children experiencing domestic violence.

name: Crisis Text Line
short_description: Free 24/7 text-based mental health crisis support. Text HOME to 741741.

name: Samaritans
short_description: UK free 24/7 emotional support helpline.

name: Mind — Mental Health Charity
short_description: UK charity providing mental health information and local support.

name: NAMI — Mental Health Support
short_description: National Alliance on Mental Illness — information and support for mental health conditions in the US.

name: Planned Parenthood
short_description: US reproductive health organisation providing health care, education, and advocacy.

name: Abortion Finder
short_description: US directory of verified abortion providers by location.

name: US Fibroid Foundation
short_description: US patient education and advocacy for uterine fibroids — the leading cause of heavy periods.

name: British Thyroid Foundation
short_description: UK patient charity for thyroid and related hormone conditions.

name: American Thyroid Association
short_description: US patient information on thyroid conditions and their effect on the body.

name: Jean Hailes for Women's Health
short_description: Australian women's health organisation providing information on menstrual health, hormones, and menopause.

name: SOGC — Women's Health
short_description: Society of Obstetricians and Gynaecologists of Canada — patient information on menstrual health, PCOS, endometriosis, and gynaecological conditions.

name: Endometriosis México
short_description: Organización de pacientes fundada en 2009. Información, directorio de especialistas y grupos de apoyo para endometriosis en México.

name: Fundación Endometriosis México
short_description: Atención integral a mujeres con endometriosis sin acceso a tratamiento especializado. Con sede en Jalisco, México.

name: SAPTEL — Apoyo Psicológico
short_description: Servicio de apoyo psicológico y crisis por teléfono, gratuito, confidencial, disponible las 24 horas en México.

name: Línea de la Vida
short_description: Línea nacional gratuita del gobierno mexicano para salud mental, crisis emocional y adicciones. Disponible 24/7.

name: INMUJERES — Vida sin Violencia
short_description: Instituto Nacional de las Mujeres — recursos federales para mujeres que viven violencia de género. En caso de emergencia, llama al 911.

name: EndoFrance
short_description: Association française de lutte contre l'endométriose, agréée par le ministère de la Santé. Information, groupes de soutien régionaux et annuaire de spécialistes.

name: ENDOmind
short_description: Association nationale de patientes atteintes d'endométriose, agréée par le ministère de la Santé. Organise l'ENDOmarch et l'ENDOrun.

name: TDPM France
short_description: Première et seule association française dédiée au Trouble Dysphorique Prémenstruel (TDPM). Sensibilisation, communauté de patientes et plaidoyer.

name: Asso'SOPK
short_description: Association nationale de patientes atteintes du Syndrome des Ovaires Polykystiques (SOPK). Annuaire d'éducation thérapeutique et communauté de soutien.

name: Solidarité Femmes — 3919
short_description: Numéro national de référence pour les femmes victimes de violences. Gratuit, disponible 24h/24, opératrices parlant 12 langues.

name: 3114 — Prévention du Suicide
short_description: Numéro national officiel de prévention du suicide, disponible 24h/24. Répondu par des professionnels de santé formés.

name: SOS Amitié
short_description: Écoute émotionnelle et soutien en cas de crise par des bénévoles formés, disponible 24h/24. Gratuit et anonyme.

name: Sexualités-info-santé
short_description: Portail officiel de santé sexuelle du gouvernement français (Santé publique France). Information validée par des experts sur les IST, la contraception et la santé reproductive.

name: Endometriose-Vereinigung Deutschland
short_description: Deutschlands größte Selbsthilfeorganisation für Endometriose-Betroffene. Persönliche Beratung, regionale Selbsthilfegruppen und Facharzt-Verzeichnis.

name: PCOS Selbsthilfe Deutschland
short_description: Nationale Selbsthilfeorganisation für Frauen mit PCOS (Polyzystisches Ovarsyndrom). Online-Selbsthilfegruppen, Beratung und Spezialisten-Vermittlung.

name: PMDS Hilfe e.V.
short_description: Deutsche Non-Profit-Organisation für PMDS (Prämenstruelles Dysphorisches Syndrom). Patientinnen-Community, Arzt-Verzeichnis und Aufklärungsarbeit.

name: Hilfetelefon — Gewalt gegen Frauen
short_description: Bundesweites Hilfetelefon für Frauen, die Gewalt erfahren. Kostenlos, anonym, 24/7 erreichbar in 15 Sprachen.

name: TelefonSeelsorge
short_description: Kostenlose, anonyme Krisenbegleitung und emotionale Unterstützung, 24/7 erreichbar. Auch per E-Mail und Chat.

name: Stiftung Deutsche Depressionshilfe
short_description: Info-Telefon Depression: kostenlose anonyme Auskunft zu Depressionen, Behandlungsmöglichkeiten und lokalen Anlaufstellen.

name: LIEBESLEBEN (BIÖG)
short_description: Offizielle Sexualgesundheits-Initiative des Bundes (ehemals BZgA). Information zu HIV, STIs, Verhütung und sexueller Gesundheit.
